description_long: This storage box is constructed from light-colored wooden planks arranged horizontally, framed by thicker wooden beams at the edges and corners. The front and back panels feature a prominent diagonal wooden brace, adding structural strength and a rustic aesthetic. The wood shows subtle weathering, with some visible stains and minor discoloration, suggesting outdoor or garage use. The top surface is flat and bordered by the same thick wooden beams, making it suitable for stacking or supporting other objects. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, and the box appears to be a solid, closed container. Its robust build and utilitarian design make it ideal for storing tools, equipment, or miscellaneous items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or backyards.
description: A sturdy, light-wood storage box with horizontal planks, diagonal bracing, and a flat, framed top. The weathered finish and solid construction suggest it is suited for garages or outdoor storage.
description_view_0: Front view shows horizontal planks with a diagonal brace and thick wooden framing.
description_view_1: Side view displays only horizontal planks and the same thick frame, without diagonal bracing.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, with horizontal planks and a diagonal brace, but the wood grain and stains differ slightly.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features horizontal planks and thick framing, similar to view 1, with no diagonal brace.
